description: Foundation Milestones are trackable micro-achievements below the Beginner level. They provide progress feedback for athletes who are below the OP Beginner benchmarks. Milestones are NOT levels. They are pre-level markers that apps can use to show early progress. Estimated timelines assume a healthy but sedentary adult training 3x/week.

milestones.name: Foundation
milestones.description: Can perform basic human movements safely. Standing movements only, no floor work. A chair and household items are all you need.

requirements.name: Chair Sit-to-Stand
requirements.description: Stand up from a standard-height chair 10 times without using hands

requirements.name: Wall Push-up
requirements.description: 10 push-ups against a wall with full range of motion

requirements.name: Farmer's Carry
requirements.description: Carry two heavy bags or water bottles while walking for 30 seconds

milestones.name: Moving
milestones.description: Can perform bodyweight exercises with good form. Floor work introduced, still no gym needed.

requirements.name: Incline Push-up
requirements.description: 10 push-ups with hands on a bench-height surface

requirements.name: Standing Hip Hinge
requirements.description: 10 bodyweight hip hinges with flat back, hands sliding down thighs to just below knee

requirements.name: Forearm Plank
requirements.description: Hold a forearm plank for 30 seconds with neutral spine

milestones.name: Ready
milestones.description: Movement quality and base fitness sufficient for structured training. Ready for gym onboarding and barbell introduction.

requirements.name: Air Squat (Full Depth)
requirements.description: 20 bodyweight squats below parallel with good form

requirements.name: Knee Push-up
requirements.description: 10 push-ups from knees with chest to floor and full lockout

requirements.name: Dead Hang
requirements.description: Hang from a bar for 15 seconds with straight arms

requirements.name: Forearm Plank
requirements.description: Hold a forearm plank for 60 seconds with neutral spine

requirements.name: Jog 1500m
requirements.description: Jog 1500 meters without walking breaks, at any pace
